chosen_action.title: Surface the Apollo runtime-blocker review packet instead of another empty-board pause

why_this_action.summary: The execution board names the Apollo runtime-blocker review packet as the single best executable asset still waiting. Current short-window congestion blocks another truthful live outbound action, and this packet had not yet been delivered in the current review window.

evidence: execution board lists the Apollo runtime-blocker review packet as do-now asset
outreach-log.md contains no prior delivery entry for this packet
recent repair logs show board surfacing and Browserless truth repair, but not packet delivery

result.summary: Delivered the current Apollo runtime-blocker review packet to the active chat so the due Codeberg-first outbound lane stays visible without pretending the Cloudflare-blocked Apollo runtime is live.
